deals.title: Steve Jimenez — Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. First offer (Michael Rodriguez / RBFCU) dead — no earnest money received. Steve finished clearing. New prospect inquired about subdividing or alternate use. Strategy: lead with net after close on all offers.
deals.next: Follow up with new prospect. Arrange drone footage for marketing upgrade. Lead with net after close on next offer.

logs.m: Steve sent new photos. New prospect reached out wanting to show — interested in subdividing or alternate use. Sent her information and set expectations.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. First offer confirmed dead. Drone footage flagged as next content priority.
Current offer dead — option money not received. Steve still clearing. Key message: net after close is what matters.
RBFCU financing decision expected Apr 10.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751

logs.m: Work officially starting — Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend. Will check progress when in Devine.
Met with Matt Toney in his office. Connected him directly with Jerry Sadler (Priority Bank) on a call. Goal: work starts by Monday.
Two estimates compared: HouzzPro $54,877 vs T&T $61,980. Jerry Sadler emailed Ray Stidham recommending HouzzPro. Ray confirmed as bank decision-maker.
Kendall pricing flagged too high. Actively shopping alternatives. Self-manage option still explored.
Kelly confirmed damage occurred after bank possession. Meeting Matt Van Gorder on-site for estimate.
Shot video and photos. Sent to Kendall and Matt Van Gorder for quotes. Reaching out to Marc (plumber).

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Sellers underwater by $93K-$143K. Payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K. Vacant 6 months, double-carrying costs. Three paths: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close. Showing May 5 occurred — need feedback. Grass still unresolved.
deals.next: Get buyer feedback from May 5 showing agent. Drop sign and lockbox when in Devine. Follow up with Matt and Chandler on path decision. Check clubhouse for lawn referrals.

logs.m: Dropping sign and lockbox this week when in Devine. Need feedback from May 5 showing agent before updating Matt and Chandler. Grass unresolved.
Buyer showing at 2pm by outside agent. Lawn care referral from Garry Stephens — Morales Tree Trimming 830-444-7804. A.M. Lawn Care also visiting for quote.
Express Offers returned $550K value — likely off vs CMA ($350K-$400K). Showing scheduled May 4. Checking in with Matt and Chandler on options.
Full market analysis completed. Underwater by $93K-$143K. Three paths identified: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close.
Gilberto buyers appear wishy-washy — seller finance likely dead. Need honest price adjustment conversation.
Showing at property — potential owner finance buyer. Using as leverage for pricing conversation.

deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv — Analysis
deals.notes: Off-market flip deal analysis. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42K-$62K. CMA pulled — 31 comps, avg sale $207K, estimated value $266K. Building branded property analysis template from this deal.
deals.next: Pull MLS comps and RPR report. Feed data to Sirhc — build first analysis sheet. Lock template on this deal for reuse.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Used as basis for building property analysis tool. Numbers pulled and reviewed.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Referral from Isaac Linares. Motivated seller relocating to NC by second week of June. Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live Wednesday May 13. Hairline foundation crack flagged for disclosure. List price $259,900.
deals.next: Canvass neighborhood before launch — knock on doors. Drop sign and lockbox at property this week. Launch MLS Wednesday May 13.

logs.m: Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live Wednesday May 13. Plan to canvass neighborhood before launch.
Pre-inspection scheduled 8:30 AM with Coach Ricky Smith. Chris arriving at 10 AM to review findings and get Jose signature on listing contract.
Katy reviewing listing agreement with husband. Payoff discrepancy still unresolved — $170K stated vs $192K public records.
Listing consultation on-site at 11am. Met Isaac and Jose and Katherine. Went well. Foundation crack discussed. Packet delivered. Sellers confirmed moving forward via email.
CMA completed — recommended list price $259,900. Best comp 12015 Agnew Ridge sold $252K in 25 DOM.
